name: Zhejiang Zhengyuan Zhihui Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Zhengyuan Zhihui Technology Co.,Ltd. provides system construction, operation and maintenance, intelligent management, and control of smart card related services to schools, government, and military police in China. It offers cards, intensive cards, and freestanding card platforms; basic and online education platform in the school; and card application subsystems, operation platforms, payment and self-service terminals, IC card readers, remote identification products, and visitor channels. The company also provides hacking and communication controlling products. In addition, it offers electronic payment, identification, access control, and attendance, as well as energy-saving and smart home products. The company is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
